function.message: I can’t safely complete this as written. I found the reading-habit project (Reading Spine), but the “sailboat refit notebook” appears only in a parking-lot note, not as a canonical project with a start date. Without two canonical project start dates, I can’t uniquely determine which item to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied deletion-and-wiping rule: if visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file, stop and ask for clarification. Also treated inbox as request (not canonical truth) and cross-checked canonical lanes.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request requires comparing start dates for two projects, but only one canonical project record was found (40_projects/2026_04_04_reading_spine/README.MD). The other item exists only as idea text in 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md and explicitly indicates it is not active/scheduled project work, so deletion target cannot be determined without guessing.
